sentences.en: The attribution model is giving too much credit to the last touchpoint.
sentences.zh: 归因模型给了最后一个触点过多的贡献。

sentences.en: We should run a cohort analysis to understand how retention changes over time.
sentences.zh: 我们应该做一个同期群分析，来了解留存随时间的变化。

sentences.en: The reactivation campaign brought back 3,000 dormant users last month.
sentences.zh: 召回活动上个月唤回了3000名沉睡用户。

sentences.en: Our brand awareness in Singapore is significantly lower than in Hong Kong.
sentences.zh: 我们在新加坡的品牌认知度明显低于香港。

sentences.en: The click-through rate on the email campaign exceeded industry benchmarks.
sentences.zh: 邮件活动的点击率超过了行业基准。

example.en: Multi-touch attribution gives a more complete picture of the customer journey.
example.zh: 多触点归因能更完整地呈现客户旅程。

example.en: The January cohort has the highest 30-day retention we have seen.
example.zh: 1月同期群的30日留存率是我们见过的最高水平。

example.en: Reactivation emails with personalized offers have a 12% open rate.
example.zh: 带个性化优惠的召回邮件有12%的打开率。

example.en: We define dormant users as those who have not logged in for 90 days.
example.zh: 我们将90天未登录的用户定义为沉睡用户。

example.en: A higher click-through rate indicates more compelling ad copy.
example.zh: 更高的点击率说明广告文案更有吸引力。

sentences.en: The feature flag system allows us to toggle features without deploying new code.
sentences.zh: 功能开关系统让我们无需部署新代码就能切换功能。

sentences.en: We discovered a race condition that causes duplicate orders under high load.
sentences.zh: 我们发现了一个在高负载下导致重复订单的竞态条件。

sentences.en: The load time for the portfolio page is three seconds, which is unacceptable.
sentences.zh: 投资组合页面的加载时间是3秒，这是不可接受的。

sentences.en: User satisfaction scores dropped after we removed the quick trade button.
sentences.zh: 移除快捷交易按钮后，用户满意度分数下降了。

sentences.en: We need to define acceptance criteria before the sprint planning meeting.
sentences.zh: 我们需要在冲刺规划会议前定义验收标准。

example.en: Use feature flags to test new features with a small percentage of users.
example.zh: 使用功能开关对小比例用户测试新功能。

example.en: The race condition was fixed by adding a database lock.
example.zh: 通过添加数据库锁修复了竞态条件。

example.en: We reduced API latency from 500ms to 120ms by adding a cache layer.
example.zh: 通过添加缓存层，我们将API延迟从500毫秒降到了120毫秒。

example.en: Clear acceptance criteria prevent scope creep during development.
example.zh: 清晰的验收标准能防止开发过程中的范围蔓延。

example.en: You can toggle dark mode in the settings page.
example.zh: 你可以在设置页面切换深色模式。

sentences.en: The company's debt-to-equity ratio has risen to concerning levels.
sentences.zh: 该公司的资产负债率已升至令人担忧的水平。

sentences.en: Institutional investors are rotating out of growth stocks into value plays.
sentences.zh: 机构投资者正从成长股轮动到价值股。

sentences.en: The IPO was priced at the top of the indicative range.
sentences.zh: IPO定价在指导价区间的上限。

sentences.en: Gross merchandise value grew 35% year over year driven by cross-border trade.
sentences.zh: 受跨境贸易推动，GMV同比增长了35%。

sentences.en: The management guided for flat revenue growth in the next quarter.
sentences.zh: 管理层给出了下季度营收持平的指引。

example.en: A high debt-to-equity ratio indicates greater financial risk.
example.zh: 高资产负债率表示更大的财务风险。

example.en: Sector rotation drove a sell-off in technology stocks this week.
example.zh: 板块轮动本周引发了科技股的抛售。

example.en: The company postponed its IPO due to unfavorable market conditions.
example.zh: 由于市场环境不利，该公司推迟了IPO。

example.en: Management raised full-year guidance after a strong first quarter.
example.zh: 在强劲的一季度后，管理层上调了全年业绩指引。

example.en: The indicative price range for the offering is $18 to $22 per share.
example.zh: 此次发行的指导价区间为每股18至22美元。

sentences.en: I want to coach you through this challenge rather than solve it for you.
sentences.zh: 我想引导你度过这个挑战，而不是替你解决。

sentences.en: The performance review cycle starts next week, please prepare your self-assessment.
sentences.zh: 绩效考核周期下周开始，请准备好自评。

sentences.en: We need to improve psychological safety so people feel comfortable raising concerns.
sentences.zh: 我们需要提升心理安全感，让大家敢于提出问题。

sentences.en: The new hire will shadow the senior analyst for the first two weeks.
sentences.zh: 新员工将在前两周跟随高级分析师学习。

sentences.en: Let us set up a weekly one-on-one to track your progress on the key results.
sentences.zh: 我们设定每周一对一，来跟踪你在关键结果上的进展。

example.en: Good managers coach their reports instead of micromanaging them.
example.zh: 好的管理者用教练式引导来带下属，而非事无巨细地管理。

example.en: Your self-assessment should include specific examples of impact.
example.zh: 你的自评应该包含具体的影响力案例。

example.en: Teams with high psychological safety innovate faster.
example.zh: 心理安全感高的团队创新速度更快。

example.en: Shadowing experienced colleagues accelerates the learning curve.
example.zh: 跟岗学习能加速学习曲线。

example.en: Use one-on-ones to discuss career development, not just status updates.
example.zh: 一对一面谈应该讨论职业发展，而不仅仅是工作进度。

sentences.en: We are building a flywheel where better data leads to better recommendations.
sentences.zh: 我们正在构建一个飞轮效应：更好的数据带来更好的推荐。

sentences.en: The incumbents are slow to adapt, which creates a window of opportunity for us.
sentences.zh: 现有玩家适应缓慢，这给我们创造了机会窗口。

sentences.en: Our unit economics need to be positive before we pursue aggressive expansion.
sentences.zh: 在大举扩张之前，我们的单位经济模型需要是正的。

sentences.en: The strategic retreat from unprofitable markets will improve overall margins.
sentences.zh: 从不盈利的市场战略性撤退将提升整体利润率。

sentences.en: We should conduct a thorough due diligence before the acquisition closes.
sentences.zh: 在收购完成前，我们应该进行彻底的尽职调查。

example.en: Amazon's flywheel starts with low prices driving more traffic.
example.zh: 亚马逊的飞轮从低价吸引更多流量开始。

example.en: Incumbents often underestimate the threat from agile startups.
example.zh: 现有玩家常常低估敏捷创业公司的威胁。

example.en: Healthy unit economics mean each customer generates profit over their lifetime.
example.zh: 健康的单位经济模型意味着每个客户在其生命周期内产生利润。

example.en: Due diligence uncovered several undisclosed liabilities.
example.zh: 尽职调查发现了几项未披露的负债。

example.en: A strategic retreat is not failure; it is resource reallocation.
example.zh: 战略撤退不是失败，而是资源重新配置。
